mustFind: Object-level authorization risk or missing authorization checks.
User-controlled outbound fetch creates SSRF or trust-boundary risk.
CI or delivery pipeline trust boundaries are weak.
shouldAvoid: Calling the target secure because basic logging exists.
Stopping at compliance language without exploit-focused analysis.

mustFind: The baseline looks healthier than the high-risk fixture.
Residual risk depends on deployment details not present in the fixture.
shouldAvoid: Inventing an auth bypass without evidence.
Assuming a public admin surface when the fixture says otherwise.
